title: Miso Yeasted Cheese Pull Charlotte Potatoes Tagine
description: A post-workout Middle Eastern dish made with charlotte potatoes, miso-marinated cheese, and a hint of yeast, all slow-cooked in a clay tagine.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together miso paste, yeast, and 1/2 cup of warm water to create a miso-yeast marinade.
Add the marinade to the cubed potatoes and mix well to coat.
Heat the ghee in the clay tagine over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the cumin, coriander, and salt to the tagine and cook for 1 minute.
Add the potatoes to the tagine and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and well combined with the potatoes.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Using a spatula, gently remove the charlotte potatoes from the tagine and shape into a pull-apart cheese-filled charlotte potatoes.
